title: Cooked Flesh
description: Rotten flesh can now be cooked into cooked flesh
body:
Rotten flesh can now be cooked into **cooked flesh**, allowing players to consume it without any negative effects-perfect for _zombie apocalypse_ modpacks
![Ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82f0bb7937cc609ae064239cd21ee0de978dfaa7.png)
